summary: Decent mid‑80s Dead show with solid moments in “CC Rider”, “He’s Gone” and “Eyes”, captured on an audience tape that sounds good but a bit distant.
review: The performance is an average‑to‑good outing from the mid‑80s run, offering highlights like “CC Rider”, “He’s Gone” and a nice stretch of “Eyes”. The recording was made from the back of the house, giving it a generally good sound but with a distant, hollow character that some listeners find off‑putting.

ai_rating.rationale: Show is modestly enjoyable with a few standout songs, while the audience recording quality is uneven (good in places but distant/hollow), leading to an overall below‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally good tape sound noted by one reviewer, but described as distant and hollow by another; recorded from the back of the house.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Decent listening with good moments scattered throughout; nothing spectacular but also no major flaws—an uneven mid‑80s set.

band_member_comments.Bob: Leads a rousing croon on "CC Rider" and delivers a sunshine daydream vibe.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent has fun with post‑space blues sections.
